# TrustMRR Intake Card

> Working draft: this template already reflects the active `one idea -> one shared document` workflow, but the exact specialist section structure should be revised later when each research agent is finalized.

> Stage rule: `intake_verdict` is the only decision field that may be set before specialist work. The `Final Decision` block stays pending until specialist sections are complete and reviewed.

## Intake Normalization

- `venture_id`:
- `source_url`:
- `capture_date`:
- `source_platform`:
- `product_name`:
- `product_url`:
- `site_domain`:
- `reported_revenue_or_mrr`:
- `one_line_problem`:
- `likely_icp`:
- `offer_type`:
- `pricing_visibility`:
- `proof_product_is_live`:
- `monetization_hint`:
- `demand_hint`:
- `default_path_fit_concerns`:
- `duplicate_check`:
- `strongest_direct_source`:
- `corroborating_sources`:
- `open_questions_for_specialists`:
- `intake_verdict`: `REJECT` / `RESEARCH` / `HOLD`
- why this deserves specialist time:
- what must be proven next:
- what would kill it quickly:

## Preserved Scout Summary

- `product_name`:
- `trustmrr_slug`:
- `product_url`:
- `trustmrr_source_url`:
- `recommended_next_step`:
- `one_line_hypothesis`:
- `why_this_might_fit`:
- `obvious_red_flags`:
- `duplicate_note`:

## Preserved TrustMRR Raw Snapshot

- paste or link the normalized raw `TrustMRR` snapshot here

## Preserved SimilarWeb Enrichment

- paste or link the normalized `SimilarWeb` enrichment here

## Preserved Derived Heuristics

- paste or link the scout heuristics here

## Competition Section

- owner: `Competitor Scout`
- direct competitors found:
- retained competitor evidence cards:
- excluded lookalikes:
- live competitor count:
- pricing visibility:
- pricing reality summary:
- traffic market summary:
- customer voice summary:
- evidence index:
- switching friction notes:
- category shape:
- contradictions:
- freshness:
- confidence:
- artifact verdict: `PASS` / `RETRY` / `ESCALATE`
- content result: `positive` / `negative` / `inconclusive`

## Demand Section

- owner: `Demand Validator`
- recurring job hypothesis:
- demand classes checked:
- acquisition surfaces observed:
- contradictions:
- freshness:
- confidence:
- artifact verdict: `PASS` / `RETRY` / `ESCALATE`
- content result: `positive` / `negative` / `inconclusive`

## Monetization Section

- owner: `Revenue Validator`
- pricing reality:
- path to first payment:
- path to `$5k MRR`:
- economics caveats:
- contradictions:
- freshness:
- confidence:
- artifact verdict: `PASS` / `RETRY` / `ESCALATE`
- content result: `positive` / `negative` / `inconclusive`

## Final Decision

- owner: `Research Lead`
- stage status: `pending until Competition + Demand + Monetization are reviewed`
- specialist sections complete:
- revision requests closed:
- hard-gates summary:
- weighted score:
- final verdict: `pending` / `QUEUE` / `KILL` / `KILL FOR NOW`
- why:
- open risks:
